positive: A highly stylized, neo-geometric depiction of a fantastical, symmetrical bioluminescent forest clearing. The composition features crystalline flora, intertwined root systems, and glowing archways, forming a central, harmonious silhouette. The style should be a blend of intricate detailed line art and Art Nouveau geometry, rendered with strong, clean vector lines. Utilize a limited, deep jewel-tone color palette (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by glowing gold lines and negative space. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, making the outlines pop against a deep, mysterious background. Central composition, high contrast, suitable for all-over apparel printing, UHD, flat design principles, zentangle inspired.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, gradient (unless intended glow), photography, realistic rendering, muddy colors, messy composition
